column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Blowing out a candle flame gently" | TEXT="おやすみなさいませ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the full moon through a window" | TEXT="良い夢を" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting on an engawa (veranda) in the moonlight" | TEXT="夜風が心地よいですわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Closing a bamboo blind (sudare) slowly" | TEXT="更けゆく夜に" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Inhaling the scent of incense smoothly" | TEXT="安らかな眠りを" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Reading a scroll by a paper lamp" | TEXT="夜更かしはいけませんわ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Covering someone with a warm haori coat" | TEXT="お静かにおやすみください" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Observing fireflies by a stream at night" | TEXT="また明日お会いしましょう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Drinking a nightcap of warm tea" | TEXT="夢で会いましょう"
